title: Finally, a Programmable AI Agent Framework That Works
excerpt: Flu is an opensource framework built by Astro team for building AI agents programmatically. Supports skills, tools, MCP
html: Flu is an open-source framework built by Astro team for building AI agents programmatically. Supports skills, tools, MCP services, sandboxes, and reusable components out of the box. Built on Pi minimal harness (same as OpenClaude). Can deploy to Node or Cloudflare Workers. Key feature: sandboxes all
